title: cordia seleriana
intro: Cordia seleriana, also known as the Bolivian cherry, is a plant species native to the Andes mountain range in South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cordia seleriana include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health, as well as its potential to protect against cancer and cardiovascular disease. Cordia seleriana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its medicinal effects.
